descriptionTemplate: Ryker gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Gain [Power:Arg2] {STR}. In this battle, Gain a selected {Chaotic Legacy} Relic, or upgrade an already owned {Chaotic Legacy}.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Ryker gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Gain [Power:Arg2] {STR}. In this battle, gain a chosen {Chaotic Legacy} Relic or upgrade an already owned {Chaotic Legacy} Relic; this triggers 2 times in succession. All of Ryker's six-sided dice are upgraded to eight-sided dice.
